## Sheet1
| 机制相关 | \_Buff | 基础buff配置 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| NaN | \_BuffCondition | buff条件配置 |
| NaN | BuffActive | buff具体参数 |
| NaN | BuffOdds | buff施加概率 |
| NaN | FightBuff | 战斗内临时buff逻辑 |
| NaN | Skill | 技能相关 |
| NaN | SkillLevelupDamage | 技能升级系数 |
| 文字/buff表现 | BuffGroupRule | 技能升级数值表现 |
| NaN | BuffView | buff展现 |
| NaN | SkillLine | 技能树 |
| NaN | SkillLineCorner | 技能树 |
